name: kie-mcp
description: Call any KIE.ai endpoint from Claude. Thin HTTP shim — agent constructs payloads from docs.kie.ai.
long_description: Generic MCP server that wraps the KIE.ai REST API. Three tools (kie_post, kie_get, kie_run_and_wait) let Claude submit and poll tasks for any KIE model — GPT Image 2, Nano Banana 2, Seedance, Kling, Suno, anything KIE ships. No model registry, no validation: Claude reads the live JSON shape from https://docs.kie.ai and constructs the payload itself.

kie_api_key.title: KIE.ai API Key
kie_api_key.description: Your KIE.ai API key. Get one at https://kie.ai

tools.name: kie_get
tools.description: GET from any KIE endpoint (typically polling).

tools.name: kie_run_and_wait
tools.description: Submit a task and poll until done.
